name: Thai Wire Products Public Company Limited
summary: Thai Wire Products Public Company Limited engages in the manufacturing and sale of prestessed concrete wires in Thailand and internationally. Its products include steel wires and strands for prestressed concrete, galvanized steel wires and strands, cold drawn steel wires for concrete reinforcement, hard drawn steel wires, and ordinary low carbon steel wires. The company was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Pathum Thani, Thailand.
